description: State document in Arabic script. The beginnings of 7 lines are preserved. Mentions a ship, probably docking of a ship (mursā), and is likely dated 406 H. Needs further examination. Reused for Hebrew piyyuṭ/seliḥot on recto (refrain: חוס...).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
